qas.a: The losing command until the individual signs in at the next duty station.

qas.a: Air force Records and Distribution Schedule.

qas.a: To encourage open and frank communication with the witnesses.

qas.q: For which mishap is a promise of confidentiality authorized?

qas.a: Afloat, motor vehicle, and ground and industrial.

qas.a: witness' memories degrade as time passes.

qas.q: the best location to conduct an interview is...
qas.a: where the witness was during the mishap.

qas.a: Tab T- Investigation, Analysis, and Conclusions

qas.q: On what do you base mishap findings?
qas.a: Weight of the evidence, Professional knowledge, investigators best judgement

qas.a: Continue to ask why until you come to a dead end.

qas.a: Directing the analysis at local problems for which the functional managers have control.

qas.a: Small amounts of data result in large changes.
